texto: It is precisely by binding things together that traditional visions perpetuate themselves and the prejudgments contained within them
autor: and it is by insisting on prising things apart that we have liberated ourselves from them
explicacao: Citação de and it is by insisting on prising things apart that we have liberated ourselves from them sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is precisely by binding things together that traditional visions perpetuate themselves and the…” articula reflexao, ernest-gellner, precisely em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
